description_long: This is a plush, classic Chesterfield-style armchair with a deep, rounded back and armrests that are equal in height, creating a cozy, enveloping seat. The upholstery is a soft, matte brown fabric with a prominent button-tufted pattern across the backrest, arms, and lower front panel, giving it a luxurious and vintage appearance. The seat cushion is thick, removable, and slightly sunken, providing ample comfort. The armrests are wide and heavily padded, curling outward in a traditional rolled design. The back of the chair is fully upholstered and rounded, with the tufting continuing seamlessly around the sides and rear. There are no visible legs, as the base is fully skirted and upholstered, giving the chair a grounded, monolithic look.
description: A plush, brown, button-tufted Chesterfield armchair with rolled arms and a thick, removable seat cushion. The chair is fully upholstered with a matte, soft fabric and has no visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the deep, button-tufted backrest, wide rolled arms, and thick seat cushion.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the continuous tufted upholstery and the outward curve of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded, fully upholstered back with button-tufting and no visible legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the rolled armrest and seamless fabric finish.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered, rolled and rounded
attribute_backrest_style: tufted and rounded, medium height, continuous with arms
attribute_leg_type: no visible legs, fully skirted and upholstered base
